positive: A clean, minimalist silhouette illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The central elements include stylized deer grazing amongst oversized, stylized ferns and flowering flora. The composition should be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, featuring deep contrast between the solid black silhouettes and a vivid, gradient background of deep teal, sapphire blue, and earthy emerald green. The style should be inspired by vintage scientific botanical sketches mixed with modern graphic novel aesthetics, rendered with crisp line work, no gradients on the subject itself, only on the background. High contrast, perfect for apparel transfer printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, grainy, messy, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, cartoon, photorealistic, realistic skin
